message:
test(runtime): simplify tests using ShardedObservability

Update test files to use the new ShardedObservability pattern:

- property_region_ops.rs: major simplification by leveraging shared
  observability state (-73 lines of boilerplate)
- runtime_e2e.rs: update to use sharded observability helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
